params.name: include_count
params.description: Set to true to include the total count of content types in the response.

items.docs: Retrieves comprehensive information of all content types available in a stack. Supports include_count parameter to return the total count of content types.

params.name: content_type_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the content type.

params.name: version
params.description: Retrieve a specific version of the content type schema.

items.docs: Returns detailed information for a specific content type identified by its UID, including all field definitions and schema metadata.

params.name: content_type_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the content type.

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale code to retrieve localized content. Defaults to the default locale of the stack if not specified.

params.name: skip
params.description: Number of entries to skip for pagination.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries to return. Maximum allowed is 250.

params.name: query
params.description: A JSON-encoded query object to filter entries. Supports MongoDB-style query operators for field matching and comparison.

params.name: include_count
params.description: Set to true to include the total count of matching entries.

params.name: include_content_type
params.description: Set to true to include the content type schema in the response.

params.name: include_reference
params.description: Set to true to include referenced entries inline in the response.

params.name: only
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

params.name: except
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to exclude from the response.

params.name: asc
params.description: Field name to sort results in ascending order.

params.name: desc
params.description: Field name to sort results in descending order.

items.docs: Fetches a list of all published entries for a particular content type. Supports filtering by query, localization, reference inclusion, pagination, sorting, and field selection.

params.name: content_type_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the content type.

params.name: entry_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the entry.

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale code to retrieve localized content. Defaults to the default locale of the stack if not specified.

params.name: include_reference
params.description: Set to true to include referenced entries inline in the response.

params.name: version
params.description: Retrieve a specific published version of the entry.

items.docs: Retrieves a specific published entry identified by its UID within a given content type. Supports localization, reference inclusion, and field selection parameters.

params.name: content_type_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the content type.

params.name: entry_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the entry.

items.docs: Retrieves all personalization variants of a specific entry, including their variant UIDs and customized field values.

params.name: content_type_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the content type.

params.name: entry_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the entry.

params.name: variant_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the entry variant.

items.docs: Retrieves a specific variant of an entry identified by the variant UID. Returns the customized field values for that variant.

params.name: skip
params.description: Number of entries to skip for pagination.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of entries to return. Maximum allowed is 250.

params.name: include_count
params.description: Set to true to include the total count of assets in the response.

items.docs: Fetches a list of all published assets in the stack including images, videos, and documents. Supports pagination, filtering, and field selection.

params.name: asset_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the asset.

items.docs: Retrieves a specific asset by its UID, returning all metadata including file URL, dimensions, file size, and content type.
Fetches all reusable global field definitions available in the stack. Global fields can be embedded in content type schemas to create consistent field structures across multiple content types.

params.name: global_field_uid
params.description: The unique identifier (UID) of the global field.

items.docs: Returns the schema and metadata for a specific global field identified by its UID.

params.name: init
params.description: Set to true to initiate the first sync and receive a sync token.

params.name: sync_token
params.description: The token received from a previous sync response. Use to fetch only changes since the last sync.

params.name: pagination_token
params.description: Token to retrieve the next page of results in a large sync response.

params.name: type
params.description: Filter sync results by content type. Options: entry_published, entry_unpublished, entry_deleted, asset_published, asset_unpublished, asset_deleted, content_type_deleted.

params.name: content_type_uid
params.description: Filter sync results to a specific content type UID.

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale code to retrieve localized content. Defaults to the default locale of the stack if not specified.

items.docs: Initiates an initial sync or continues a paginated sync of all published entries and assets in the stack. Use init=true for the first sync to receive a sync token. Use the sync_token from subsequent responses to fetch only the changes since the last sync.
